channel.title: Work on 沉风网事
channel.description: Recent content in Work on 沉风网事

item.title: principles for deep work
item.description:
Block out any distractions

  • turn off all phone notifications or leave it in another room

  • Distraction is the biggest enemy to deep focus

Go for a walk before starting

  • Go out in nature

  • Explore somewhere new

Plan it out the night before

  • Set your main 3 priorities

  • Write them down and forget until morning

Blout out time around your schedule (Eg: 6-8 am)

  • This will be protectedtime

  • Stay consistant with that time

item.title: tips for time management
item.description:
backgroud

Time > Money.

tips

1. The 2-Minute Rule

If it takes less than 2 minutes, do it now, Yes, even if it’s getting up to stretch Procrastination is for stretching, not tasks!

2. The 5-Minute Rule

try it more than 5 minutes even the task is hard.

3. Eat the Frog First

Tackle the hardest task first thing in the morning, Frogs taste better when you’re notthinking about them all day.
